psalm-88-1.verse:
O Lord, the God of my salvation,
  I have cried out by day and in the night before You.
psalm-88-1.prayer: Lord, God of my salvation, I cry out to You in the day and in the night. Hear me and draw near to my pain.

psalm-88-2.verse:
Let my prayer come before You;
  Incline Your ear to my cry!
psalm-88-2.prayer: Father, let my prayer come before You. Incline Your ear to my cry and remind me that You are listening.

psalm-88-3.verse:
For my soul has had enough troubles,
  And my life has drawn near to Sheol.
psalm-88-3.prayer: Lord, when my soul feels full of trouble, hold me close and keep me anchored in Your presence.

psalm-88-4.verse:
I am reckoned among those who go down to the pit;
  I have become like a man without strength,
psalm-88-4.prayer: Father, when I feel weak, forgotten, or near despair, breathe strength and hope into my heart.

psalm-88-5.verse:
Forsaken among the dead,
  Like the slain who lie in the grave,
  Whom You remember no more,
  And they are cut off from Your hand.
psalm-88-5.prayer: Lord, when I feel cut off or alone, remind me that I am never beyond Your sight, love, or care.

psalm-88-6.verse:
You have put me in the lowest pit,
  In dark places, in the depths.
psalm-88-6.prayer: Father, when I feel placed in darkness or deep sorrow, be the light that guides me through.

psalm-88-7.verse:
Your wrath has rested upon me,
  And You have afflicted me with all Your waves. Selah.
psalm-88-7.prayer: Lord, when hardship feels heavy upon me, sustain me with Your mercy and help me endure with faith.

psalm-88-8.prayer: Father, when loneliness surrounds me, comfort me with Your presence and remind me that You are near.

psalm-88-9.prayer: Lord, when my eyes grow weary from sorrow, help me keep calling upon You and lifting my hands in prayer.

psalm-88-10.verse:
Will You perform wonders for the dead?
  Will the departed spirits rise and praise You? Selah.
psalm-88-10.prayer: Father, when I cannot understand Your work, help me trust that Your power and mercy are still present.

psalm-88-11.verse:
Will Your lovingkindness be declared in the grave,
  Your faithfulness in Abaddon?
psalm-88-11.prayer: Lord, let Your lovingkindness and faithfulness be known even in the darkest places of my life.

psalm-88-12.verse:
Will Your wonders be made known in the darkness?
  And Your righteousness in the land of forgetfulness?
psalm-88-12.prayer: Father, reveal Your wonders in my darkness and teach me to recognize Your righteousness even when I feel overwhelmed.

psalm-88-13.verse:
But I, O Lord, have cried out to You for help,
  And in the morning my prayer comes before You.
psalm-88-13.prayer: Lord, I cry to You for help. Let my morning begin with prayer, hope, and trust in Your faithfulness.

psalm-88-14.verse:
O Lord, why do You reject my soul?
  Why do You hide Your face from me?
psalm-88-14.prayer: Father, when I feel distant from You, remind me that You have not abandoned me and that Your love remains steady.

psalm-88-15.verse:
I was afflicted and about to die from my youth on;
  I suffer Your terrors; I am overcome.
psalm-88-15.prayer: Lord, when suffering feels long and exhausting, strengthen me with grace and keep my heart from giving up.

psalm-88-16.verse:
Your burning anger has passed over me;
  Your terrors have destroyed me.
psalm-88-16.prayer: Father, when fear and pressure overwhelm me, cover me with Your peace and hold me securely in Your care.

psalm-88-17.verse:
They have surrounded me like water all day long;
  They have encompassed me altogether.
psalm-88-17.prayer: Lord, when troubles surround me like floodwaters, lift me above despair and help me breathe again in Your presence.

psalm-88-18.verse:
You have removed lover and friend far from me;
  My acquaintances are in darkness.
psalm-88-18.prayer: Father, when I feel alone or separated from comfort, be my closest companion and my unfailing hope.

psalm-88-closing.verse:
Lord, thank You for hearing even the prayers that come from darkness, sorrow, and exhaustion. When I feel overwhelmed, lonely, or unable to understand what You are doing, help me keep crying out to You. Be near to me in pain, sustain me through hardship, and remind me that Your love is still present even when I cannot feel it. May my hope remain anchored in You, my God and my salvation.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
psalm-88-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for hearing even the prayers that come from darkness, sorrow, and exhaustion. When I feel overwhelmed, lonely, or unable to understand what You are doing, help me keep crying out to You. Be near to me in pain, sustain me through hardship, and remind me that Your love is still present even when I cannot feel it. May my hope remain anchored in You, my God and my salvation.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
